subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-29
subcodes.first_line: No, but some souls, by their good morals and deeds do. For instance, a son by his good deeds may be the cause of the redemption of his father if he does good deeds.... There is a kind of mathematics where they take the name of a person according to 'Abjad'
subcodes.subjects: @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @astrology and numerology, @differences in human capacity, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
